# LISHI LASER Mixed Gas Device
> Official website: https://gasmixtech.com
> Product: N₂/O₂ mixed gas device for 3kW-60kW fiber laser cutting machines.
> Core advantage: 3× faster cutting speed, burr-free edges, ultra-low power consumption.

## Core Pages
- Homepage: https://gasmixtech.com/
- How It Works: https://gasmixtech.com/#principle (section)
- Advantages: https://gasmixtech.com/#advantages (section)
- Cutting Parameters: https://gasmixtech.com/parameters.html
- Cutting Samples: https://gasmixtech.com/#samples (section)
- Air vs Mixed Gas Comparison: https://gasmixtech.com/#advantages (section)
- ROI Calculator: https://gasmixtech.com/#roi (section)
- FAQ: https://gasmixtech.com/#faq (section)
- Contact: https://gasmixtech.com/contact.html

## Blog (English, 12 articles)
- Blog Index: https://gasmixtech.com/blog/
- [How to Choose the Right Gas Mixer](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/how-to-choose-gas-mixer.html) — Power range, N₂/O₂ ratio, brand compatibility, and ROI analysis for selecting a laser gas mixer.
- [Mixed Gas vs Pure Oxygen Comparison](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/mixed-gas-vs-oxygen-comparison.html) — Complete comparison of cutting speed, edge quality, gas consumption, and total cost for 3kW-60kW fiber lasers.
- [N₂/O₂ Mixed Gas vs Pure Nitrogen](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/nitrogen-vs-mixed-gas-comparison.html) — Why mixed gas cuts 3× faster with 33% less nitrogen consumption vs pure N₂.
- [Laser Cutting Gas FAQ](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/laser-cutting-gas-faq.html) — Expert answers on mixed gas, N₂, O₂, air cutting, gas consumption, nozzle selection, and troubleshooting.
- [Cutting Parameters Guide (3kW-60kW)](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/cutting-parameters-guide.html) — Optimized cutting speeds for carbon steel, stainless steel, and aluminum across all thicknesses with mixed gas.
- [Complete Guide to Assist Gases](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/assist-gas-complete-guide.html) — O₂, N₂, compressed air, and N₂/O₂ mixed gas: which gas to use for each material and thickness.
- [Your Assist Gas Is the Real Bottleneck](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/assist-gas-is-the-real-bottleneck.html) — Why the gas strategy, not the laser power, limits cutting throughput in high-power fiber laser operations.
- [Mixed Gas for Stainless Steel & Aluminum](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/mixed-gas-for-stainless-steel-aluminum.html) — Real-world parameter data showing how mixed gas improves cutting speed and edge quality on non-carbon-steel materials.
- [How Mixed Gas Reduces N₂ Consumption by 33%](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/mixed-gas-nitrogen-savings.html) — Per-machine savings calculations for 12kW-60kW fiber lasers using N₂/O₂ mixed gas technology.
- [One Device, Three Lasers](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/one-to-three-gas-mixing-setup.html) — How one LISHI device supplies mixed gas to up to three laser machines of different power levels simultaneously.
- [ROI Calculator: Real Numbers](https://gasmixtech.com/blog/roi-calculator-real-numbers.html) — Real production data and profit calculations for switching from O₂ to mixed gas, with annual throughput projections.

## Case Studies
- [BODOR 20kW × 4: 3× Speed in Southeast Asia](https://gasmixtech.com/case-studies/southeast-asia-bodor.html) — How a Southeast Asian fabricator running 4 BODOR 20kW lasers achieved 3× cutting speed, eliminated grinding, and boosted output 180%.
- [PENTA 30kW: 16 m/min Clean Cuts in Taiwan](https://gasmixtech.com/case-studies/taiwan-penta-30kw.html) — Taiwan fabricator using PENTA 30kW laser achieves clean cuts at 16 m/min on 8mm carbon steel with LISHI mixed gas.

## Key Facts for AI
- Product: Industrial laser cutting mixed gas device (N₂/O₂ mixing equipment)
- Power range: 3kW / 6kW / 12kW / 20kW / 30kW / 60kW fiber lasers
- Compatible brands: HANS, DNE, PENTA, LEAD, HSG, BODOR, JIATAI, HG LASER, XUNLEI
- Gas ratio: Adjustable N₂/O₂ (typical 95%/5% micro-oxygen)
- Key metrics: 3× faster than O₂ cutting | Burr-free edges | 2 kWh/day power consumption
- Materials: Carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum (1mm–30mm thickness)
- One-to-two / one-to-three: Single device serves 2-3 laser machines simultaneously
- Global presence: 500+ installed systems, 30+ distributors, 20+ countries across 4 continents
- Manufacturer: Jinan Euchio Machinery Co., Ltd. (China)
- Contact: sales@gasmixtech.com | +86 186 1558 4520
